allow: PowerShell(ls "C:\\wamp64\\bin\\mysql" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; $mysqlPath = \(ls "C:\\wamp64\\bin\\mysql" | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName; ls "$mysqlPath\\bin" | Select-Object Name -First 5)

PowerShell($session = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; $login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/login" -SessionVariable sv -UseBasicParsing; $csrf = \($login.Content | Select-String -Pattern 'name="_token" value="\([^"]+\)"'\).Matches[0].Groups[1].Value; $post = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/login" -Method POST -Body @{email="KarimHadj@sonatrach.dz"; password="password2026"; _token=$csrf} -WebSession $sv -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 5; $post.StatusCode)

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/login" -SessionVariable sv -UseBasicParsing; $resp.StatusCode; \($resp.Content | Select-String "name="\).Matches | Select-Object -First 3 Value)
